title: Test methods should be discoverable
description: Test methods should not be private or have an underscore prefix.
message: Test method should not be private or have an underscore prefix.
impact: Test methods that are not discoverable can be missed during testing.
recommendation: Make test methods public or remove the underscore prefix.

noncompliant.description: Test method with double underscore prefix.

compliant.description: Test method without prefix or private.

why_is_this_an_issue: Test methods that are not discoverable can be missed during testing, leading to undetected bugs.
how_to_fix: Make test methods public or remove the underscore prefix.
